title: Will insurance cover the cost of weight loss services?
text:
Whether your medical insurance will cover weight loss services in a multidisciplinary clinic depends on the specific details of your individual plan. Coverage can vary widely, including what types of services are included (such as medical visits, nutrition counseling, or behavioral therapy) and whether certain criteria must be met.

The cost of weight loss services also varies depending on the level of care you need and the services provided. Some programs may be partially or fully covered by insurance, while others may require out-of-pocket payment.

In many cases, insurance coverage is influenced by medical necessity - for example, if you have related health conditions such as obesity, diabetes, or hypertension. Our care coordinators can assist you in contacting your insurance provider to better understand your benefits, eligibility requirements, and any potential costs before starting treatment.

section.title: Navigating Insurance Together
section.content:
Call our care coordinators to clarify your benefits and any out-of-pocket costs.
